bullets: TTM revenue $13B — in cyclical drawdown.

short_term.title: Short-term view (0–45 DTE · front-month tactical)
bullets: Front-month ATM IV: 126.2% — extreme (binary-event hedging implied).
Put/Call OI: 1.46 — put-heavy hedging (institutions defensive).
30-day implied move: ±25.9% ($1034.78 – $1757.42) — the 1-σ range the options market is pricing.

short_term.strategy: Sell 30–45 DTE cash-secured put at $1326 (5% OTM). High IV (126%) + uptrend → collect premium with a willingness to be assigned at a discount. Roll if breached, otherwise let theta decay.

90-day implied move: ±51.7% ($674.65 – $2117.55).

Term structure in backwardation (-25.8pp front→back) — near-term event premium; long-dated vol cheaper.
long_term.strategy: Sell 6-month strangle: short $1256 put / short $1536 call. Range-bound + high IV → premium-selling on both sides; profits if spot stays within ±10%; manage with rolls or assignment.
